description_long: This chest of drawers features a tall, narrow profile with six vertically stacked drawers, each adorned with ornate, butterfly-shaped handles. The body is painted a muted beige, while the top surface is a contrasting dark wood with a gently scalloped edge, adding a touch of elegance. The sides are paneled with subtle molding, and the legs are cabriole-style, giving the piece a classic, vintage appearance. The back is constructed from a plain, natural wood panel, indicating a solid yet utilitarian build. Decorative flourishes are present at the base and along the top edge, enhancing its traditional aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for use in residential or boutique urban environments, such as entryways, bedrooms, or stylish retail spaces.
description: A tall, vintage-style chest of drawers with six drawers, ornate handles, and a dark wood top. The body is beige with decorative molding and cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with ornate handles and decorative base detailing.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the paneled side and the scalloped edge of the dark wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, natural wood back panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the paneled side and cabriole leg.
